note: Runtime state-machine definitions derived from live edge function implementation and domain code.

transitions.notes: Manager claims a pairing code and assigns an org/location.

transitions.trigger: screen-credential-rotate for revoked screen or manual revocation

transitions.notes: Kiosk exits pairing and begins polling live state.

transitions.trigger: session stops or screen is unassigned
transitions.notes: No active session is assigned to the screen.
Revoked screens are blocked from playback.
Upload is confirmed with the LXC service.
LXC processing finished and manifest key available.
Processing failed and asset is marked failed.
Cron automations reschedule for next occurrence; once automations may disable after success.

transitions.trigger: automation schedule_type == once and execution succeeds
transitions.notes: One-shot automations are disabled after successful execution.

errorHandling.notes: Once automations back off 5 minutes; cron automations attempt next occurrence.

transitions.notes: Open checkout sessions expire when Stripe reports expiration.
Stripe Checkout completion finalizes the paid Team subscription.
Subscription synchronization updates local workspace subscription state.
Stripe webhook updates local status on subscription lifecycle events.
